description: An equipment manager needs to coordinate the shipment of all team equipment to an away game.

nodes.task_description: Generate a complete inventory list of all equipment that needs to be shipped.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a detailed packing list.

nodes.task_description: Book a freight service to transport the equipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books a truck for the equipment.

nodes.task_description: Track the shipment to ensure it arrives at the destination venue on time.
